reasoning: The CCCS AU-8 control focuses on ensuring that audit logs include accurate timestamps, which is critical for tracking and analyzing events. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to the audit logging capabilities of the API server. Ensuring that audit logging is enabled, and that the audit policy is configured to capture timestamps, aligns with the control's requirements. Kubernetes audit logs inherently include timestamps, but ensuring that logging is enabled and properly configured is essential.
title: CCCS AU-8: Time Stamps
